title: Find My Device - Main screen
scenario: Find My Device main screen displays map and headset list when accessed from Poly Studio Mobile app menu
steps: 1. Launch the Poly Studio Mobile app on your mobile device.
2. Ensure a Poly Bluetooth headset is connected to the app (Home screen shows the connected device).
3. Tap the App Menu (hamburger icon or menu icon) in the top-left or top-right corner of the Home screen.
4. From the menu, tap "Find My Device".
5. If prompted with a location access permission dialog, tap "Allow" or "While Using the App" to grant location access.
6. Observe the main Find My Headset screen that appears.
expected: The main Find My Headset screen displays a map showing the device's location and a list of connected/disconnected headsets.
